mapper.select:
select a.*, b.employee_name from hrm_personal_income_tax as a left join hrm_employee as b on a.employee_id = b.employee_id WHERE 1=1
AND a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee where employee_Name like concat('%',#{data.employeeName},'%'))
select * from hrm_personal_income_tax where employee_id=#{employeeId} and `year`=#{year} and end_month=#{month}
mapper.delete: delete from hrm_personal_income_tax where `year`=#{year} and end_month=#{month} and employee_id=#{employeeId}
